推荐场景: 车站屏幕前｜听懂延误/改线公告
60秒任务: 「交通公告」：公告主旨/影响判断；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 公告｜通知｜原因｜时间地点｜简短说明｜主旨理解
场景族: 新闻短片｜播客访谈｜公共广播｜活动现场｜屏幕公告
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
The train is delayed because of ___.（说明延误原因）
Service on line ___ has been suspended.（说明停运）
Passengers should take the replacement bus.（给出替代）
The next bus will arrive in about ___.（说明到达时间）
Please use the other platform.（指示地点）
The road is closed near ___.（说明封路）
There is heavy traffic on the main road.（描述交通）
Can we still get there on time?（判断时间）
We should take another route.（提出替代路线）
Let’s check the app for updates.（核对信息）
I heard the announcement, but I missed the details.（说明听漏）
What was the reason for the delay?（询问原因）
So we need to change at ___.（复述行动）
If we leave now, we may still make it.（推断结果）
Let’s go before it gets worse.（行动闭环）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: train, bus, line, platform, route, traffic, main road
Verbs: delay, suspend, arrive, change, check, miss
Adjectives / Adverbs: heavy, closed, late, on time
Time / Place: line two, other platform, near the station, in ten minutes
Chunks: train delay, replacement bus, other platform, heavy traffic, take another route
